title: March Dividend Kings: 5 Buys, 4 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive years."--Dogs of the Dow. The 47 Dividend Kings screened as of February 24, 2023, represented eight of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 15.54%-31.75% topped-by NFG & VFC.

title: 10 High-Yield Dividend Stocks To Help You Generate Income
text: In this article, I will present 10 companies that could help you generate an additional income. All the picks that I present in this article provide you with an attractive Dividend Yield.

title: Federal Realty: This Dividend King REIT Is Now Reasonably Valued
text: Federal Realty is very reasonably valued for a dividend king that has demonstrated incredible resilience over the decades. The company has some competitive advantages that have helped create this strength.

title: Federal Realty: 55 Years, 2 Yields, One Option
text: Federal Realty's commons are paying out a 3.93% dividend yield versus preferreds with a 5.7% yield on cost. Its retail-focused portfolio has weathered broader economic concerns and was 92.8% occupied as of the end of its last reported quarter, up 170 basis points sequentially.

title: 3 Retail REIT Stocks to Stay Afloat Despite Industry Hiccups
text: Although economic slowdown, inflationary pressure and rising borrowing costs remain headwinds, Zacks REIT and Equity Trust - Retail industry stocks SPG, FRT and NNN are poised to gain from omni-channel retailing, adaptive reuse capabilities and essential retail tenants focus amid limited supply.

title: The Benefits And Risks Of Investing In Dividend-Paying Stocks
text: I've been asked my thoughts on whether I invest in gold or silver, which I do not. Here's my response on why I prefer dividend investments over non-dividend-paying companies or investments.

title: Federal Realty (FRT) Beats Q4 FFO, Issues Upbeat 2023 View
text: Federal Realty's (FRT) Q4 results outshine estimates. Healthy leasing activity aids its performance, and the retail REIT issues an upbeat FFO per share outlook for 2023.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) Q4 Earnings
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended December 2022, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) Beats Q4 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 0.64% and 1.38%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For February
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. By yield, VFC topped all Aristocrats. Top-ten yields from TROW, ESS, FRT, AMCR, ABBV, O, IBM, MMM, WBA, & VFC, averaged 4.38%.

title: Is a Beat in Store for Federal Realty (FRT) in Q4 Earnings?
